verification_gate: GitNexus status is up-to-date for all four repos and repo-qualified query/context calls return the recorded ownership seams.
proof_summary: All four Yazelix repositories were indexed with GitNexus 1.6.9 in index-only PDG mode. Post-index status was up-to-date for each repository, and repo-qualified graph queries established the main-runtime, Helix bridge, Yazi asset, and terminal-support ownership seams recorded in EVIDENCE.md. The evidence also records the bounded Helix CDG limitation without treating it as a successful result. No tracked product source, selected profile, or generated Yazelix runtime was mutated.

commands.purpose: Build disposable GitNexus indexes with PDG for the four Yazelix peers
